full_text:
Plan for sample S097 culturing,

Sample: S097_pAdnL

Edit!

Diagnosis based on ice-section was carcinoma, with no precise description. Ulla-Maija later said that the sample is most likely gynecological origin but NOT high-grade (serous).

Hence, sample was processed only until cryo preservation.

Cell count:

total: 9.63E6

live: 5.61E6

viability: 58.3%

size: 8.0 um

Total cell count: 9.9E6 / ml

A) RNA/DNA extraction:

30 wells x 60 µl x = 1800 µl,

2000 cells/µl = 3.60E6 cells

🡪 make 1 x 2 ml eppendorf

volume to take from cell suspension: 126 µl

cells in medium 🡪 1373.2 µl

ome-gel (17.7 mg /mL stock) 🡪 254 µl

aprotinin (10 mg/mL stock) 🡪 5.4 µl

thrombin (100 U stock) 🡪 5.4 µl

fibrinogen (25 ug/mL stock) 🡪 36 µl

B) Drug treatment + FFPE sample (3 drops):

45 wells x 60 µl = 2700 µl,

2000 cells/µl = 5.40E6 cells

🡪 make 2 x 1.5 ml eppendorfs, 1350 µl each

volume to take from cell suspension: 95 µl

cells in medium 🡪 µl

ome-gel 🡪 190.7 µl

aprotinin 🡪 4.1 µl

thrombin 🡪 4.1 µl

fibrinogen 🡪 27 µl

total: 10.2E6

live: 6.69E6

viability: 65.7%

size: 8.4 um

C) IF on drug treatment:

7 conditions x 10 µl x 6 wells/sample = 420 µl,

2000 cells/µl = 0.84E6 cells

🡪 make 1 x 1.5 ml eppendorf

volume to take from cell suspension: 29 µl

cells in medium 🡪 320.8 µl

ome-gel 🡪 59.2 µl

aprotinin 🡪 1.3 µl

thrombin 🡪 1.3 µl

fibrinogen 🡪 8.4 µl

D) Sample for Flow - Day 0

🡪 Collect 3.0E6 cells per 900 uL flow staining buffer

E) Sample for cryo

🡪 Collect x cells per 1 mL stemcell banker
